action: Model contradictions and state-layer divergence as linked provenance records rather than overwriting earlier observations.

progress.verification: 5 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical source and test contents

claim_states.observed: The canonical queue and append-only candidate updates remain distinct repository layers.
claim_states.inferred: A compaction review is not reproducible unless it binds the exact baseline, candidate, and proposed-result bytes.
claim_states.proposed: Use the manifest builder to classify each candidate as accepted, rejected, or deferred before a separate reviewed mutation.
claim_states.superseded: No repository history or prior continuity record was removed; implicit candidate merging is superseded as a valid review route.
claim_states.unresolved: A full manifest over every current queue-update artifact has not yet been generated or approved.

privacy_boundary: Public repository files and commit metadata only; private chat, health information, credentials, identifying personal data, and unreviewed uploads excluded.
handoff: Enumerate every current operations/queue-updates artifact, assign a reviewed disposition, generate the digest-bound manifest, and only then prepare a separate ACTIVE_QUEUE.json compaction commit.
